title: Merge UX-polished LeadsTable (T8) with preview-link props (T6)
brief:
Two prior Gemini runs produced rewrites of the same file (LeadsTable.tsx):
- T8: UX polish — restructured the expansion area into a two-pane layout with action bar, polished typography, etc.
- T6: added two new props `attorneySlugById: Record<string,string>` and `casesdailyLeadInfoById: Record<string, { landing_page_url: string | null; referrer_url: string | null }>`, plus a 'Sources & Preview' section in the expansion that shows links to (a) the AI casechecker preview `https://casesdaily.com/c/<slug>/ai?preview=1` when attorney slug is known, and (b) the original landing_page_url + referrer_url from casesdaily_leads.

Produce the MERGED LeadsTable.tsx that:
- Uses T8's overall UX polish (action bar at top of expansion, two-pane layout, typography, dividers).
- Adds T6's two new optional props (default to `{}` so existing callers still compile).
- Surfaces the preview links inside the action bar (top of expansion): 'View Landing Page', 'AI Preview', 'Original Lead URL' — buttons/anchors only render when their target is available.
- Also keeps a compact 'Sources & Preview' subsection in the left pane showing the URLs with copy buttons (so the operator can grab the URL string).
- Keeps all existing handlers (onMbStatus, onBilled, onCaseQuality, etc.), all existing fields, the row-tinting helper getRowTheme.

DO NOT lose anything from either version.
outputContract:
Markdown:
1. **Merge plan** (4-6 lines)
2. **File** — one fenced code block:
   ```typescript
   // FILE: casesdaily/src/components/admin/dashboard/LeadsTable.tsx
   ```

3. **Sanity check** — 3 bullets confirming what was preserved from each source.

Light theme. Plain Tailwind. No deps.
